# Skeleton-path baseline for the tight-arc quarter-circle (both
# offset-carrier flags explicitly off).

polygon outer
0,0
200,0
arc -1.0
200,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stall-angle=90
----
set stall_angle_deg=90

debug offset_carriers=false
----
debug offset_carriers=false

debug offset_carriers_interior=false
----
debug offset_carriers_interior=false

generate
----
total_stalls: 80

snapshot
----
